Use.title: On production, on people, on the next number.
Use.lede: Quarterly is set in Georgia (display) and Inter (meta) — a deliberately old-fashioned pairing. Paper grain on the cover is mid-process; the layout is set by hand. Errata, contributors, and the next call for letters follow.

Use.body: The opening essay misattributed the on-call rotation diagram on page 12. Correct credit: Devon Park (data), Hyo-Jin Lee (composition). Apologies.
A stat in the closing graph cited 14.2% as the median; the correct figure is 13.4%. Source data unchanged.

VStack.Text: A reading week on observability. Submissions open through April 6. Letters: letters@quarterly.press.
